python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-CLOSURE')
contracts=json.loads((root/'P3_CLOSURE_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
by_id={a['artifact_id']:a for a in contracts['required_artifacts']}
schema_map={
'p3.closure.interaction_graph':'repository/schemas/interaction/interaction_graph.schema.json',
'p3.closure.interaction_nodes':'repository/schemas/interaction/interaction_node.schema.json',
'p3.closure.interaction_edges':'repository/schemas/interaction/interaction_edge.schema.json',
'p3.closure.clickable_inventory':'repository/schemas/interaction/clickable_inventory.schema.json',
'p3.closure.reaction_records':'repository/schemas/interaction/reaction_record.schema.json',
'p3.closure.reaction_applicability':'repository/schemas/interaction/reaction_applicability.schema.json',
'p3.closure.async_behavior':'repository/schemas/interaction/async_behavior.schema.json',
'p3.closure.handoff_behavior':'repository/schemas/interaction/handoff_behavior.schema.json',
'p3.closure.failure_recovery':'repository/schemas/interaction/failure_recovery.schema.json',
'p3.closure.overlay_closure':'repository/schemas/interaction/overlay_closure.schema.json',
'p3.closure.interaction_messages':'repository/schemas/interaction/interaction_message.schema.json',
'p3.closure.message_coverage_index':'repository/schemas/interaction/message_coverage_index.schema.json',
}
for artifact_id, schema_path in schema_map.items():
    schema=json.loads(Path(schema_path).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert by_id[artifact_id]['minimum_fields'] == schema['required'], artifact_id
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: schema-bound closure artifact minimum_fields match current required schema fields

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
contracts=json.loads(Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-CLOSURE/P3_CLOSURE_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
required={'artifact_id','stage_id','fixture_id','path','schema_ref','schema_payload_key','source_refs','upstream_artifact_refs','upstream_hashes','validator_ref','review_gate','promotion_state','invalidation_inputs'}
allowed_payload_keys={'graph','records','coverage_index'}
allowed_shapes={'single_object','records_array','keyed_object_map'}
for artifact in contracts['required_artifacts']:
    assert artifact['container_shape'] == 'artifact_envelope_with_payload', artifact['artifact_id']
    assert set(artifact['artifact_envelope_fields']) == required, artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['schema_payload_key'] in allowed_payload_keys, artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['payload_shape'] in allowed_shapes, artifact['artifact_id']
    assert artifact['record_minimum_fields'] == artifact['minimum_fields'], artifact['artifact_id']
reaction_applicability = next(a for a in contracts['required_artifacts'] if a['artifact_id'] == 'p3.closure.reaction_applicability')
assert reaction_applicability['payload_shape'] == 'keyed_object_map'
assert reaction_applicability['map_key_field'] == 'reaction_id'
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: all closure artifacts declare envelope fields, payload keys, record minimum fields, and reaction_id map binding where schema records lack intrinsic ids

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-CLOSURE')
artifacts=json.loads((root/'P3_CLOSURE_ARTIFACT_CONTRACTS.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
rules=json.loads((root/'P3_CLOSURE_PIPELINE_RULES.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
validation=json.loads((root/'P3_CLOSURE_VALIDATION_MATRIX.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
trace=json.loads((root/'P3_CLOSURE_TRACEABILITY_MAP.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
assert len(artifacts['required_artifacts']) == 13
assert len(rules['ordered_steps']) == 9
assert len(rules['closure_rules']) == 8
assert len(validation['validation_rows']) == 8
assert len(trace['traceability_rows']) == 9
assert all(not obj.get('open_blockers') for obj in [artifacts, rules, validation, trace])
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: artifact contracts, pipeline rules, validation rows, and traceability rows are structurally complete

validation_results.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path('build_program/phases/P3/candidates/P3-SPEC-CLOSURE')
scope=json.loads((root/'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for path in scope['actual_writes']:
    assert Path(path).is_file(), path
assert scope['forbidden_write_violations'] == []
assert scope['repository_files_modified'] is False
assert scope['control_locks_modified'] is False
assert scope['p3_distill_candidate_modified'] is False
assert scope['not_a_spec_lock'] is True
assert scope['not_a_build_lock'] is True
print('PASS')
PY
validation_results.summary: scope report actual writes exist and no forbidden repository, lock, P1, P2, distill-candidate, or root P3 phase files changed
